title: SecurityThreatModelerOutput
description: Output shape for security.threat-modeler runs: the threat model DEC and the optional tenant-isolation report.

surface.description: External surface under review (endpoint, webhook, queue, file upload).

dec_path.description: Repo-relative path to the threat-model DEC, e.g. decisions/DEC-SEC-NNN-<slug>.md.

tenant_isolation_report_path.description: Optional path to the tenant-isolation report under reports/security/, when the surface touches tenant-scoped tables.
